source_observations.local_summary: Upwork's February 4, 2026 release says AI-enabled skills grew 109% year over year, with strong growth for AI video generation/editing (+329%), AI integration (+178%), AI data annotation and labeling (+154%), AI image generation/editing (+95%), and AI chatbot development (+71%). It also says human expertise remains important and specialized fractional talent demand is increasing.
source_observations.route_effect: Score offers by explicit 2026 AI demand, local proof assets, and low gate friction instead of trying to send proposals or operate an Upwork account.

source_observations.local_summary: Existing matrix recommends a Supervised AI Agent Workflow Audit because it uses strong local proof and avoids credentials, private client data, production integrations, and platform action.
source_observations.route_effect: Reuse the strongest service shape, but score it against the official 2026 skill-growth categories.

source_observations.local_summary: Existing local assets include an AI workflow audit offer, synthetic agency reporting proof asset, Upwork profile/proposal draft, source refresh, policy review, and fictional audit rubric.
source_observations.route_effect: Prefer offers that can be proven locally with existing artifacts and synthetic data before any account, proposal, or payment gate.

scoring_model.score_formula: sum(raw_score * weight) * 20, rounded to nearest integer

candidates.skill_fit: AI Integration / Scripting & Automation / Marketing Automation
deliverables: Map one described workflow from non-sensitive notes.
Identify AI integration points, approval gates, rollback paths, and credential boundaries.
Deliver a local blueprint plus synthetic proof asset.
candidates.decision_note: Best first move: high official demand signal, strongest local proof, and no need for production access.

candidates.skill_fit: Specialized Fractional Talent / Digital Project Management / Marketing Strategy
deliverables: Inventory one team's AI workflows and operating risks.
Draft a weekly operating cadence, gate map, and measurement plan.
candidates.decision_note: Useful management-layer offer; keep behind integration audit until one sharper proof sample exists.

candidates.skill_fit: AI Chatbot Development / Customer Support / General Research Services
candidates.offer_name_local: AI Chatbot Scope And Evaluation Packet
deliverables: Define assistant boundaries and escalation rules.
Draft synthetic test conversations and acceptance checklist.
Produce an implementation-readiness packet without touching production systems.
candidates.decision_note: Good second offer, but slightly weaker local asset fit than the integration audit.

candidates.skill_fit: AI Data Annotation & Labeling / Data Processing / Experimentation & Testing
candidates.offer_name_local: AI Data Annotation QA And Governance Checklist
deliverables: Design labeling acceptance rules for one synthetic task.
Create QA sampling checklist and reviewer rubric.
Flag privacy, data license, and worker-quality risks.
candidates.decision_note: Strong public demand, but needs more dedicated local examples before it should lead.

candidates.skill_fit: AI Video Generation & Editing / AI Image Generation & Editing / Brand Strategy
deliverables: Create human-review checkpoints for AI-generated media.
Write a quality and brand-risk checklist.
candidates.decision_note: The demand signal is very high, but local proof assets are thinner and IP/reuse risk is higher.

why_first: It best matches Upwork's official 2026 AI Integration growth signal while reusing existing local workflow-audit proof assets and avoiding account, proposal, payment, credential, model/API, and public-action gates.
acceptance_checks: At least five candidate offers are scored against public demand, local asset fit, gate friction, proofability, and speed.
The recommended offer is present and has the highest fit score.
Each candidate maps to current Upwork 2026 skill-demand evidence or adjacent top skill categories.
Each candidate maps to local evidence assets.
No Upwork account, profile, proposal, client message, contract, payment, public action, private client data, model/API call, worker start, or external side effect occurs.
next_action: Create a no-send Upwork approval request packet for the recommended AI Integration Workflow Audit only after human review; keep account, profile, proposal, client data, credentials, payment, public action, worker/runtime, model/MCP, and external side effects blocked.
